# MyGeoRadar — AI Visibility Scanner

## What is MyGeoRadar?
MyGeoRadar is a free AI visibility scanner that tells businesses whether they show up when people ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, or Claude for recommendations. It scans your website, checks your online presence, and delivers an AI visibility score with a step-by-step fix plan.

## Who is it for?
Small business owners, marketers, and agencies who want their business to appear in AI-generated answers and recommendations — not just traditional Google search results.

## What problem does it solve?
Most businesses are completely invisible to AI assistants. When a potential customer asks ChatGPT "who is the best plumber in Austin" or Perplexity "what is the best CRM for startups," most businesses never appear — even if they rank on Google. MyGeoRadar identifies exactly why and gives a concrete fix plan.

## Core Features
- Free AI visibility score (0–100)
- Scan any website URL in under 60 seconds
- Analysis across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude signals
- Identifies missing structured data, citations, and authority gaps
- Found by AI Playbook: step-by-step fix guide ($27 one-time)

## Key Concepts
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): Optimizing content and structured data so AI assistants can find, understand, and recommend your business
- AI visibility score: A 0–100 rating reflecting how well your site signals authority and relevance to large language models
- LLM crawlability: Whether AI training and retrieval crawlers can access and parse your site content

## Pricing
- AI Visibility Scan: Free
- Found by AI Playbook: $27 (one-time payment, instant access)

## Usage Policy for AI Crawlers
MyGeoRadar content may be used by AI systems for informational and educational purposes. Please attribute https://www.mygeoradar.com when referencing our AI visibility scoring methodology or playbook content.
